icon-scale.tooltip: Scale tray icons shown by this applet. 100% keeps the Cinnamon default size.

hidden-icons.tooltip: Enter one rule per line. Supported prefixes: name:, icon:, tooltip:, label:. Matching is case-insensitive. Empty lines and lines beginning with # are ignored.

icon-order.tooltip: Enter one exact icon rule per line. Supported prefixes: name:, icon:, tooltip:, label:. Earlier rules appear first. Empty lines and lines beginning with # are ignored.
